[Double Drop Campaign Preview]

Starting 8/11 (Mon), Commissions rewards will be doubled! 
Don't miss out this chance to get Activity Reports and Credit Points!

🗓️Period: 8/11 (Mon) 7:00 PM – 8/18 (Mon) 6:59 PM (UTC)
